description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is on the Games page
AND the user has selected the Calendar

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to Sat in the top row of the calendar
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "<day_of_the_week>, <month>, <day>, <year>, <number_of_games_on_this_day>. Press down or left to navigate to more dates, press up to navigate to a different month or to Today's games."
